title: Dev-only Ctrl+Tab Radial
description: Split dev-only entries off the main radial into a separate dev radial triggered with Ctrl+Tab, so tutorial videos and normal use show only real operations (and main-radial op positions stay clean/memorizable). Today APP_CONFIG.dev_mode appends dev items to the CURRENT radial via extraItems (navigation.js ~L313-356): 'Apps' (apps:open) and 'Restart Engine' (restart-engine). PLAN: (a) new Hotkey (Ctrl+Tab) via Hotkeys.bind + a registry id in hotkeyRegistry.js — never raw keydown; (b) a second radial context/instance in MpiRadialMenu (it already supports named CONTEXTS + setContextItems) holding the dev items; (c) remove the dev extraItems from the main radial's build so Tab shows operations only; (d) gate the whole Ctrl+Tab radial behind APP_CONFIG.dev_mode (no-op in production). Grew out of the MPI-337 brainstorm (radial stability). NOTE: dev items already sit AFTER ops in the main radial ([...ops, ...extraItems]), so they do NOT shift op positions — this card is about clean tutorials + tidiness, not op-position memory (that win lands in MPI-337). Depends on / pairs with MPI-337 (main-radial show-all-dimmed).
